title: Clay Shirky, Associate Prof. of Interactive Media Arts
description: May 4, 2015 - "It takes a lot to make a New Yorker feel like a country mouse, but this town does it...Shanghai is a huge industrial, post-industrial city, but just the principles on which life here is ordered, a lot of which about China and not just about Shanghai; I think the biggest thing for me
text:
Clay Shirky, Associate Prof. of Interactive Media Arts
Twitter
Facebook
Weibo
May 4, 2015 - "It takes a lot to make a New Yorker feel like a country mouse, but this town does it...Shanghai is a huge industrial, post-industrial city, but just the principles on which life here is ordered, a lot of which about China and not just about Shanghai; I think the biggest thing for me is that this speed of development gives the fabric of the city a different feel." - Clay Shirky, Associate Prof. of Interactive Media Arts (by Kadallah Burrowes)

text_blocks.text: Clay Shirky, Associate Prof. of Interactive Media Arts

May 4, 2015 - "It takes a lot to make a New Yorker feel like a country mouse, but this town does it...Shanghai is a huge industrial, post-industrial city, but just the principles on which life here is ordered, a lot of which about China and not just about Shanghai; I think the biggest thing for me is that this speed of development gives the fabric of the city a different feel." - Clay Shirky, Associate Prof. of Interactive Media Arts (by Kadallah Burrowes)
